Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 149 

INSULIN_INP_COPAY_3M 

LABEL: Insulin Copay Standard Retail — Three-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a three-month supply of the insulin 
drugs on this tier, using an in-network pharmacy (INP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy). 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT:
